hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_response.filePath // .tool_input.file_path' | { read -r f; case "$f" in */backend/*.py) cd "${f%%/backend/*}/backend" && rel="${f#*/backend/}" && uv run ruff check --fix "$rel" && uv run ruff format "$rel" && uv run basedpyright "$rel" ;; esac; } 2>/dev/null || true

jq -r '.tool_response.filePath // .tool_input.file_path' | { read -r f; case "$f" in */frontend/*.tsx|*/frontend/*.ts|*/frontend/*.jsx|*/frontend/*.js|*/frontend/*.css) cd "${f%%/frontend/*}/frontend" && rel="${f#*/frontend/}" && pnpm oxlint --fix "$rel" && pnpm oxfmt "$rel" ;; esac; } 2>/dev/null || true
